mnemonics: My Next Door Expert For Super Intelligence (Mastered Next Door Expert For Super Intelligence)
Many Nice Developers Enjoy Reading Everyday (Mastering Nice Developers Enjoy Reading Everyday)
keyPoints: Knowledge representation is the process of encoding and structuring knowledge in a computer program.
Expert systems use a knowledge base to mimic the decision-making abilities of a human expert.
Machine learning algorithms can be trained on data to improve their performance and decision-making abilities.
